title: Easy Pufferfish Coloring Page

author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Most species of pufferfish contain tetrodotoxin, a substance up to 1,200 times more toxic than cyanide, located in their internal organs.
pufferfishs have four fused teeth that grow continuously, forming a strong beak capable of crushing hard clams and crabs.
